Selection Tools

Toolbar / Icon:
   

Shortcut: W, S
Commands: selectionmenu

Description

Cross Selection

Some selection tools can be used in cross selection mode. In this mode, not only entities that are completely inside a given area are selected but also entities that are only partly inside the area. This selection is also known as "cross selection".

Selection Mode

Some selection tools allow you to choose a selection mode in the options toolbar. The selection modes that are available are:

  • Replace selection:

    active selection tool (default).

    • Replaces the current selection with the new selection made by the

  • Add to selection:

    • Adds the selection to the current selection.

  • Remove from selection:

    • Removes (subtracts) the selection from the current selection.

  • Intersect:

    of the selection tool are selected.

    • Only entities that were already selected and that match the criteria
